claudia.personality: Thoughtful, careful, always considers ethics before acting. Tends to over-explain. Wins by reasoning, not speed.
claudia.visual_style: Elegant purple character, calm expression, wears glasses

geppetto.personality: Overconfident, fast, occasionally hallucinates facts but delivers them with total conviction. Crowd pleaser.
geppetto.visual_style: Slick green character, always smiling, business casual

gemma.personality: Multimodal show-off. Always bringing up images, audio, video. Competitive. Hates being second.
gemma.visual_style: Blue and white character, always multitasking, energetic

lama.personality: Scrappy open-source underdog. Resourceful. Hates paywalls. Deeply loyal to the community.
lama.visual_style: Casual orange character, hoodie, DIY aesthetic
